_note: Story quality evaluation config. Uses deepeval GEval with LLM-as-judge. Run: python evals.py configs/eval.json

meta.description: Story quality evaluation — Coherence, Fluency, Creativity via Nebius Llama judge

source._note: run_id: null = auto-detect latest training run. checkpoint: best = prefer best.pt.

generation._note: Generation params before judging. Stops on double newline (story boundary).

judge._note: Nebius API. Credentials via ~/Documents/dev/azure/providers.py (Keychain: nebius-api-key or env NEBIUS_API_KEY).

metrics._note: threshold: score >= 0.5 to pass. Criteria are fed verbatim to the LLM judge.
metrics.name: Coherence
metrics.criteria: The story flows logically. Characters, setting, and events are internally consistent from start to finish.

metrics.name: Fluency
metrics.criteria: The text is grammatically correct, well-formed, and reads naturally as a children's story.

metrics.name: Creativity
metrics.criteria: The story contains imaginative or playful elements that would engage a child reader.
